channel.title: Lazy Cat – dev blog
channel.description: Code by day, blog by night. Join me on my backend journey as we learn and grow together.

item.title: Apache Kafka Deep Dive: Từ Kiến Trúc Đến Production
item.description: Hướng dẫn toàn diện về Apache Kafka - từ kiến trúc KRaft, producer/consumer workflow, đến cấu hình production-ready cho Spring và Quarkus với 5 use cases thực tế.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Hello World
item.description: Welcome to my blog! This is my first post.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Test Mermaid Diagrams
item.description: Testing Mermaid diagram rendering with flowcharts and sequence diagrams.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: How (and why) to parse a function from a string in JavaScript/TypeScript
item.description: Safely send JavaScript functions from your server to your client by serializing them as strings, then parsing them back into callable functions on the client side.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: How to disable popup showing accented characters when press and hold a key on macOS
item.description: How to disable popup showing accented characters when press and hold a key on macOS.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Shopify Hydrogen Codegen Configs
item.description: How to configure Shopify Hydrogen Codegen to automatically generate types for your GraphQL queries.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Macos command to zip files and directories into a single file.
item.description: Macos command to zip files and directories into a single file.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Relative time-ago parsing in TypeScript
item.description: A simple utility function to parse relative time-ago into human-readable format.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Enhance Github security by connecting using Secure Shell Protocol (SSH)
item.description: Using the SSH protocol, you can connect and authenticate to remote Github servers and services without supplying your username and personal access token at each visit.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Pnpm aliases
item.description: How to install and update pnpm, create a shell alias for it, and upgrade project dependencies efficiently.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: VSCode settings and keyboard shortcuts
item.description: My personal VSCode configurations, settings, and key bindings that I use across all my devices.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Common npm commands to use locally
item.description: Essential npm commands for local development, covering package installation, version control, and script management.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Simple way to handle route submission in a Remix app
item.description: Create a custom hook to manage in-route form submissions in a Remix app.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Verifying Github webhooks requests in Node.js
item.description: Verify and process incoming GitHub webhooks. How to set up listeners, validate requests, and handle Github's webhook events.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: How to work with Spotify's API to display currently playing track on a website?
item.description: Retrieve a Spotify access token to display the currently playing track on your website or application.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: String casing utilities in JavaScript
item.description: A various ready-to-use string casing utilities in Typescript.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: How to safely rename a case sensitive file/directory in a git repo?
item.description: Safely rename case-sensitive files or directories in a Git repository to avoid conflicts or case inconsistencies.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Remove all falsy values from an object and its nested children
item.description: Recursively removes all falsy values (null, undefined, 0, false) from an object and its nested properties.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: A custom hooks to use an async effect
item.description: Build a custom React hook to use asynchronous effects inside functional components.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Validate if a string is a valid color
item.description: Validate strings to ensure they represent valid colors in various formats (hex, RGB, and named colors).
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Find which process is running on a certain port and kill it
item.description: Identify and terminate processes running on a specific port in your dev environment.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Markdown Code block's basic and advanced syntaxes
item.description: A detailed overview of Markdown code block syntaxes, covering both basic and advanced use cases.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Simple Event-Emitter/PubSub pattern
item.description: A lightweight pub/sub mechanism to handle custom events without adding a full-blown library.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Adding/substracting days in Shopify's Liquid template language
item.description: How to manipulate dates (adding, subtracting, and formatting, etc) in Shopify's Liquid template language.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Read all file names in a directory
item.description: A quick utility to read all file names in a directory using Node.js.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Replace all VNese letters with the corresponding English accents
item.description: Convert Vietnamese text to plain English by replacing accented characters with their equivalents.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Ignore all files in a directory except a specific file
item.description: How to ignore all files in a directory except for a specific one.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Synchronize React component state with local storage
item.description: Utilize a custom hook that syncs state with local storage, allowing for persistent state between sessions.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)
